# Memmy v1.0.2

## Highlights

- Added a jump-to-latest control for quickly returning to the newest conversation activity.
- Added clearer desktop update download progress and improved the macOS packaging flow.

## Memory reliability

- Improved agent-source scan completion and recovery across supported integrations.
- Made failed memory processing easier to recover while preserving more accurate error details.
- Prioritized memory health during startup and added desktop support for restarting the memory service.

## Desktop and CLI refinements

- Restored automatic microphone reopening on macOS after the microphone becomes available again.
- Stabilized terminal input and cursor handling.
- Unified project version reporting across the Memory runtime, agent, and desktop application.
- Aligned installed-source status styling in the desktop interface.
